features: THE PERFECT GIFT : Is it a friends birthday? Or do you have a family member that loves collecting mugs? Our fun unique mugs are the ideal gift to make anyone smile.
HIGH QUALITY CERAMIC : Our mugs are made of high quality ceramic with a high gloss finish.
11OZ COFFEE MUG : Our printed mugs have the capacity of 312 grams or 11 ounces.
VIBRANT PRINT : All our mugs are printed both sides with a vibrant durable print.
DISHWASHER & MICROWAVE SAFE : Our mugs are microwave safe where you can easily have heat tea, coffee or chocolate in them. You can easily wash it with a dishwasher but we recommend hand washing.
MADE IN THE UK - All our mugs are designed and printed by Cherish Charlie Designs right here in the UK.
description: Product Description Funny Mug With Quotes - A Comedic Companion for Your Morning Coffee Start your day with a smile and a chuckle with this hilarious mug.
